videoSnippet.title: The Perfect Attacking Game || Hans Niemann vs Jan-Krzysztof Duda || Super Rapid & Blitz Poland 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Niemann, Hans Moke (2699) - Duda, Jan-Krzysztof (2743) 
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Poland 2026 (Chess.com) [26] 2026.05.07

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Bc5 4.d3 d6 5.c3 Bb6 6.O-O Qf6 7.Be3 Nge7 8.Nbd2 h6 9.b4 g5 10.a4 g4 11.Ne1 Nd8 12.a5 Bxe3 13.fxe3 Qg5 14.Qe2 h5 15.d4 h4 16.Nd3 O-O 17.Bb3 Kg7 18.dxe5 dxe5 19.Rad1 Ng6 20.b5 Qe7 21.Rf5 g3 22.Rdf1 c6 23.Qh5 f6 24.hxg3 hxg3 25.R1f3 Ne6 26.Rxg3 Ng5 27.Rgxg5 fxg5 28.Rxg5 Rf6 29.Nxe5 Qe8 30.Bf7 Qh8 31.Rxg6+ Rxg6 32.Qxg6+ Kf8 33.Qd6+ Kg7 34.Qe7 Bh3 35.Be8+

0:01 Hello Everyone!

02:20 CNG (Be3)
